name: Evil Jungle Prince with Chicken (or Mixed Vegetables)
recipeInstructions:
1. Thinly cut chicken into 2-inch strips. If doing the veggie version, cut veggies into thin strips.
2. Grind together red chili peppers, lemon grass, and kaffir lime leaves.
3. Heat oil in a pan and sauté pepper mixture for three minutes.
4. Stir in coconut milk and cook for two minutes.
5. Add chicken (or vegetables) and cook until cooked through.
6. Reduce heat to medium-low.
7. Stir in fish sauce and basil.
8. Serve on a bed of chopped cabbage.
Note: For the mixed vegetables, choose from among bell peppers, string beans, water chestnuts, small cherry tomatoes, bamboo shoots, miniature corn, asparagus, cucumbers, zucchini, Japanese eggplant, and mushrooms. I particularly like string beans or asparagus, a few cherry tomatoes, shredded (rather than sliced) bamboo shoots, miniature corn, and stone straw mushrooms or slender (Japanese) eggplant.
